name: Verifiable Durable + Auditable Agent Orchestration
description: Multi-agent orchestration where a COORDINATOR dispatch-board cell holds a conserved budget + a mandate and issues each WORKER an ATTENUATED mandate (a scope-narrowed tool-set ∧ a sub-budget ∧ a sub-task — strictly weaker than the coordinator holds: granted ⊑ held, the proven non-amplification). Every worker step is a cap-gated VERIFIED TURN the executor re-enforces the budget policy on (AffineLe(spent_a+spent_b<=budget) + Monotonic meters + StrictMonotonic epoch); a wider tool, an over-budget spend, or a replayed step is REFUSED, fail-closed, in the fire path. The whole run is a DURABLE workflow checkpointed to a receipt log (crash-recoverable, exactly-once on resume, modeled on pg-dregg::workflow), and it is AUDITABLE: an auditor (a light client) re-derives the run from the receipt chain (verify_receipt_extends + a per-step mandate re-check + the swarm-budget conservation check) and proves no agent ever exceeded its mandate — a clean run audits OK, a tampered or over-mandate step is DETECTABLE. The durable+auditable twin of swarm-orchestration (the SAME slots + coordinator_program). Rust mirror of metatheory/Dregg2/Apps/AgentOrchestration.lean (worker_authority_subset_orchestrator) + AgentOrchestrationBudget.lean (the affine budget tooth) + Deos/WorkflowBridge.lean + Protocol/Workflow.lean.

deos.mount: register_deos (src/lib.rs) — folds the composed DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry; DeosApp::mount yields the axum router
deos.persistence: pg-dregg (the durable workflow posture — the receipt chain is the commit log)
deos.publish: Signature (the board cell is a dregg:// sturdyref an auditor on another federation reacquires)

affordances.view_audit: cap-only, Signature (an AUDITOR reads + re-derives the run from the receipt chain)
affordances.worker_step: GATED (cap∧state), Either — board-open precondition (EPOCH>=1); the fire submits the FULL step (meter + epoch), the executor re-enforcing AffineLe(spent_a+spent_b<=budget) + StrictMonotonic(epoch) + Monotonic(meters)
affordances.delegate_mandate: cap-only, None/root, Effect::GrantCapability (the coordinator hands a worker an ATTENUATED slice — derive_no_amplify)

deos.seam: CLOSED — the fire runs against the FACTORY-BORN/seeded coordinator cell carrying coordinator_program(), so the AffineLe budget gate, WriteOnce mandate/lead, and StrictMonotonic epoch BITE in the deos fire path (tests/deos_surface.rs)

surfaces.durable: OrchestrationEngine + OrchestrationLog + audit_run/recover/resume (src/durable.rs + src/lib.rs) — the pg-dregg-shaped durable + auditable workflow
surfaces.mcp: mcp::step_from_mcp_call (src/mcp.rs) — a live MCP tools/call run AS a verified worker step, content-addressing the exact tool + arguments

manifest_health.durable_audit: verify_receipt_extends over the chained TurnReceipts + the per-step mandate re-check
